characters.name: 沈维桑
characters.appearance: 17岁人族猎户兼旧驿后裔，灰褐猎衣、草药青内层、旧皮护腕、猎弓、短刀、路线包；左肩旧伤必须持续可见。
characters.wardrobe: Grey-brown hunter clothing, herb-green inner layer, old leather wrist guards, bow, short knife and route pack; his injured left shoulder remains visible and limiting.

characters.name: 晏南枝
characters.appearance: 18岁人族旧帝国皇室旁支，黑发红线、冷灰/雾紫流亡外袍、隐藏月白玉片与血牒；逃亡中仍保持挺直礼法姿态。
characters.wardrobe: Human imperial remnant, black hair tied with a red thread, cold grey or mist-purple fugitive robe, hidden moon-white jade and blood record; upright ritual posture even while fleeing.

characters.name: 陆青砾
characters.appearance: 墙下无姓混裔少女，灰蓝短袄、陶土色内层、碎陶护符、黑市通行木牌、腰间窄刀、耳后细鳞痕。
characters.wardrobe: Wall-foot nameless hybrid girl, grey-blue short jacket, clay inner layer, broken pottery charm, black-market wooden pass, narrow knife and faint scales behind the ear.

characters.name: 薛临墙
characters.appearance: 边墙老墙师，灰石厚衬袄、旧甲片、粗麻墙巾、冻裂手指、骨哨、磨损长枪；动作沉重短促。
characters.wardrobe: Old border-wall master, thick grey-stone padded coat, old armor plates, rough wall scarf, cracked frozen fingers, bone whistle and worn spear; heavy economical movement.

characters.name: 灰墙军
characters.appearance: 边墙军户群体，旧甲片、厚衬袄、黑石灰、干血暗红、骨哨和裂盾；必须有年龄/职业差异。
characters.wardrobe: Border-wall military households in patched armor, thick coats, black-stone dust, dry blood red, bone whistles and cracked shields, with visible age and role variety.

characters.name: 虫族小兵
characters.appearance: 纯虫族小兵，负责封锁退路和外圈压阵，暗绿甲壳与军阶牌要和官吏/奴兵区分。
characters.wardrobe: Pure insect infantry sealing exits and holding the perimeter, dark green carapace and rank plates distinct from clerks and slave soldiers.

characters.name: 鹿弥
characters.appearance: 北境鹿族伤者/萨满线索人物，鹿耳短角、骨饰、血盐袋、药草袋、骨笛；伤势与求救状态要清楚。
characters.wardrobe: Northern deer-clan wounded guide, deer ears and short antlers, bone ornaments, blood-salt pouch, herb pouch and bone flute; injury and rescue state must read clearly.

locations.name: 锁喉关
locations.spatial_layout: 黑石城门、骨钟、粮仓门、墙顶雪道、旧日月阵基和暴雪。

locations.name: 墙顶雪道
locations.spatial_layout: 墙顶狭窄雪道、侧门、拒马和守墙军户的身体代价。

locations.name: 旧日月阵基
locations.spatial_layout: 裸露旧阵基、雪泥、骨笛和巨兽停步的局部因果。

props.name: 骨钟
props.description: 锁喉关警报与北境攻城压力锚点。
props.description_en: bone bell alarm anchoring Suohou Pass siege pressure

props.name: 粮仓门
props.description: 肃明控粮与薛临墙现实主义选择的空间道具。
props.description_en: granary gate showing Suming grain control and Xue Linqiang's survivalist pressure

props.name: 骨笛
props.description: 鹿弥和北境求救/停兽逻辑的核心道具。
props.description_en: bone flute used by Lu Mi and northern rescue or beast-calming logic

continuity_rules: 沈维桑左肩旧伤、猎户动作和有限旧驿共鸣必须按剧本代价呈现，不能升级成无代价法术。
晏南枝血牒和月白玉片只在剧本指定压力中暴露，逃亡装保持遮蔽但不削弱气度。
肃明层级必须区分白册官吏、奴兵、虫族小兵、白翳/甲军府，不混成同一种敌人。
金赤只属于旧驿、日月纹、盟书和残页；虫蜡白/骨白属于清明院制度空间；边墙雪线保持黑石、冰青、旧铁和干血暗红。
所有动作按真实重心和真实接触反作用生成，避免摆拍、漂浮慢动作和无因果奇观。
